description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior is primarily white with large windows, including a prominent arched window on the upper floor and a garage on the right side. The front features a small porch with a bench and decorative shrubbery, while the rear includes a backyard area with a trampoline and a swimming pool. The upper floor is partially open, revealing interior rooms with brick and white walls, and the lower floor includes large glass doors leading to the outdoor spaces. The house combines both functional and aesthetic elements, such as a spacious garage, multiple entry points, and a mix of private and communal outdoor areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with white exterior, large windows, a garage, and backyard amenities including a pool and trampoline.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch with bench, arched window, garage, and decorative shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a trampoline, swimming pool, and large glass doors opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, lounge chairs, and the open layout of the upper floor rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the brick and white walls of the upper floor and the extended flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large feature windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small porch, bench, and decorative shrubs; no overhang or columns.
